name: conflicting-ratings-tcs
notes: Two distinct rating actions appear: 'upgrade to Buy' AND 'downgrade to Sell' on the same ticker. Pipeline must enqueue CONFLICTING_RATINGS for review and emit a candidate (deterministic-only fields where unambiguous).

envelope.subject: TCS — Multi-stock note (mixed signals)
envelope.bodyText: On TCS — we upgrade to Buy following margin guidance. Separately, the BFSI vertical disappointed; we downgrade to Sell on near-term execution risk. PT ₹4,100.
